steps.title: Understand infinitely many solutions
steps.content: An equation has infinitely many solutions when both sides are identical expressions. This means the equation is an identity—it's true for every value of $x$.

steps.title: Match terms to find k
steps.content:
For the equation $7x + 21 = 7x + k$ to be an identity:
  • The coefficient of $x$ is already 7 on both sides ✓
  • The constant terms must also match: the left side has 21, and the right side has $k$
Therefore, $k = 21$.
